🎉 Create a Board

Celebrate the
Newest Arrival

Shower expecting parents with love, advice, and sweet messages. Create a collaborative digital baby book that the whole team can sign, no matter where they are.

Create a Baby BoardView an Example
★ The sweetest way for teams to say congratulations
GIFT IDEA🧸

"We printed our digital board into a beautiful hardcover book. The parents were in tears reading messages from the whole global team!"

A
S
M
+42
Signed by 45 colleagues

How it works

Four sweet steps to celebrate the newest addition to the family

Create Board

Start a sweet baby board and set up the expecting parents

1Dashboard

Gather Love

Collect sweet advice, well wishes and cute gifs from the whole team

2Collaborate

Baby Book

A beautifully printed premium baby book shipped as a gift for the nursery

3Keepsake

Celebrate!

Share a private link, export as PDF and shower them with love

4Share

Hover over each card to explore

Global Baby Greetings

Colleagues from around the world share their excitement and sweet wishes for the newest addition to the family!

“
A

Aditi Sharma

Marketing Lead📍 New Delhi, India
1 hour ago

“ Congratulations on the arrival of your little bundle of joy! Wishing your family endless happiness, love, and precious moments together. ”
